projects.name: S5 League
projects.description: S4 League remade in Unity Engine. Basically S5 League.

media.caption: latest characters lists design screenshot. every character has his own info. inventory or friend list it's not shared. it's like making a new account. 13/04/2026
latest reate room design screenshot. only deathmatch gamemode currently. 13/04/2026
latest friend list design screenshot. you can whisper (even if he is offline), invite to room or remove him. 13/04/2026
a screenshot of how whisper looks. 13/04/2026
latest inventory design screenshot. can only equip items. 13/04/2026
latest profile design screenshot. you can see your account & character info. 13/04/2026
this is how it looks when you are in a room lobby. 13/04/2026
latest settings design screenshot. the settings are always saved. 13/04/2026
this is the shop. you can buy with PEN or AP or both. 13/04/2026
remade almost entire UI + DAMAGE TO PLAYERS! 12/04/2026

notes.title: Hello, world!
notes.content: this is a project that i work on just for fun. it's not intended to be public after it's done, but i want to share the progress with everyone. this is a remake of S4 League in Unity Engine, called S5 League

notes.title: New in-game screenshots.
notes.content: enjoy new screenshots and videos from the current state of the game.

notes.title: devnote
notes.content: bug fixes for client & server / you can see who killed who with what weapon / death animation + invincibility / 7 seconds delay until respawn.

projects.name: Cleaner Buddy
projects.description: Windows PC cleaner with file scanner, registry cleaner, startup manager, duplicate finder, privacy cleaner, services manager and more.

notes.title: Released!
notes.content: CleanerBuddy is a Windows desktop app built with WPF and .NET 10. It features a file cleaner (temp, cache, browser), registry scanner, startup manager, duplicate finder, disk analyzer, privacy cleaner, and a full services manager.
